data.reasoning: Both models failed to review PKGBUILD due to erroneous binary file classification, leaving critical build/install logic unexamined. Without PKGBUILD analysis, safety cannot be determined.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (critical file defining build/install steps) was skipped by both models
Potential .install scripts or hooks were not reviewed due to initial PKGBUILD skip
false_negatives: All risks in PKGBUILD (build commands, source URLs, install hooks) were completely missed
Potential issues in install scripts (if present) were undetected due to audit failure
re_audit_focus: PKGBUILD (validate text format and audit contents)
Any scripts executed in prepare()/build()/package() functions
learnings: Fix binary detection: PKGBUILD should never be classified as binary. Implement proper text file detection.
Fail-safe handling: Abort audit with clear error if PKGBUILD can't be read, rather than skipping.
File priority: Always prioritize PKGBUILD and .install files in initial scanning phase.
Pre-audit checks: Add validation step to confirm PKGBUILD is readable before model invocation.
